Risk_Description: Landlord contact information could be exposed to anonymous visitors or collected for spam.
Affected_Feature_or_Requirement: Apartment detail and contact flow / FR-07, FR-15
Mitigation_Action: Hide contact from anonymous users; show it only to authenticated students; use a property/business contact method.
GitHub_Evidence: Data Inventory; Privacy and Consent; Basic Security issues

Risk_Description: Exact coordinates or addresses could reveal a private home rather than only the advertised property.
Affected_Feature_or_Requirement: Map and apartment location / FR-03, FR-07, FR-15
Mitigation_Action: Use verified property locations only; remove owner home addresses; consider approximate preview markers.
GitHub_Evidence: Data Inventory; Privacy and Consent; Basic Security issues

Risk_Description: Users may share passwords, OTPs, banking details, government IDs, or confidential information in messages.
Affected_Feature_or_Requirement: Student-landlord and roommate messages / FR-02, FR-15
Mitigation_Action: Display safety warnings; restrict messages to participants; prohibit sensitive information; add reporting, moderation, and rate limiting.
GitHub_Evidence: Legal and Ethical; Basic Security issues

Risk_Description: A roommate post or message could contain discriminatory, harassing, or harmful requirements.
Affected_Feature_or_Requirement: Roommate board and messages / FR-05, FR-15
Mitigation_Action: Allow neutral voluntary preferences only; publish content rules; provide reporting and admin moderation.
GitHub_Evidence: Legal and Ethical; Basic Security issues

Risk_Description: Public listing photos could contain faces, identity documents, license plates, private backgrounds, or copied images.
Affected_Feature_or_Requirement: Listing upload and gallery / FR-03, FR-07, FR-15
Mitigation_Action: Require permission; accept property/room images only; review before approval; support deletion and replacement.
GitHub_Evidence: Privacy and Consent; IP Assets; Basic Security issues

Risk_Description: The source and permission for landing-student-room.webp are not documented.
Mitigation_Action: Identify creator and license; replace with a team-created or verified open-license image if proof is unavailable.

Risk_Description: public/icons.svg contains branded symbols with undocumented sources and appears unused.
Mitigation_Action: Remove the unused file or identify each source, license, permission, and brand guideline.

Risk_Description: Fake, outdated, duplicate, misleading, or unavailable apartment listings could harm users.
Affected_Feature_or_Requirement: Listing submission, status, and moderation / FR-03, FR-08, FR-09
Mitigation_Action: Require admin approval; allow owner status updates; remove invalid listings; avoid unsupported verification claims.
GitHub_Evidence: Legal and Ethical; Basic Security issues

Risk_Description: Test results, screenshots, or feedback in the public repository could reveal participant identities.
Affected_Feature_or_Requirement: Validation evidence and GitHub documentation / FR-15, FR-16
Mitigation_Action: Use participant codes; redact identifiers; review screenshots; publish aggregated or anonymized results.
Owner: Phyo Wai Aung / Arkar Kyaw Oo
GitHub_Evidence: Data Inventory; Privacy and Consent; README/Logbook issues

Risk_Description: Authentication, messaging, search, and upload endpoints have no documented application-level rate limit.
Affected_Feature_or_Requirement: Accounts, messages, search, uploads / FR-10, FR-15
Mitigation_Action: Add rate limiting before public production use, with stricter limits for sign-in, messages, and uploads.

Risk_Description: Internal database or service-provider error details could be returned to users.
Affected_Feature_or_Requirement: Backend API error handling / FR-10, FR-15
Mitigation_Action: Return generic client messages and keep technical details in protected server logs.

Risk_Description: Google Maps and Supabase use is governed by external terms, privacy policies, attribution, and API-key requirements.
Affected_Feature_or_Requirement: Maps, authentication, database, storage / FR-04, FR-07, FR-15
Mitigation_Action: Preserve attribution; restrict keys; link privacy information; review service terms before public launch.
